---
title: "CV"
page-layout: full
---

<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Contact</h2>
<div class="cv-entry">
<span class="cv-title">Jake Harmon</span><br>
[jakebluesharmon@gmail.com](mailto:jakebluesharmon@gmail.com) · [github.com/jakebharmon](https://github.com/jakebharmon) · [LinkedIn](#)
</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Education</h2>

<div class="cv-entry">
<span class="cv-title">M.P.H., Environmental Epidemiology</span><br>
<span class="cv-meta">Georgia State University · Expected [Year]</span>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<span class="cv-title">[Degree], [Field]</span><br>
<span class="cv-meta">[Institution] · [Year]</span>
</div>

</div>

<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Experience</h2>

<div class="cv-entry">
<span class="cv-title">[Position Title]</span><br>
<span class="cv-meta">[Organization] · [Start]–[End]</span>

- [Responsibility or accomplishment]
- [Responsibility or accomplishment]
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<span class="cv-title">EMT / Community Paramedic</span><br>
<span class="cv-meta">[Organization] · [Start]–[End]</span>

- [Responsibility or accomplishment]
</div>

</div>

<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Research & Projects</h2>

<div class="cv-entry">
<span class="cv-title">K-Anonymity Simulation</span><br>
<span class="cv-meta">Data Privacy · [Year]</span>

[Brief description of the project and methods.]
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<span class="cv-title">Influenza A/B Modeling</span><br>
<span class="cv-meta">Infectious Disease Epidemiology · [Year]</span>

[Brief description of the project and methods.]
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<span class="cv-title">Vaccines for Children — Geospatial Analysis</span><br>
<span class="cv-meta">[Year]</span>

[Brief description of the project and methods.]
</div>

</div>

<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Skills</h2>

<div class="cv-entry">
<span class="cv-meta">Languages & Tools</span><br>
R, [Python?], SQL, Quarto, Git

<span class="cv-meta">Methods</span><br>
Epidemiological study design, spatial analysis, survival analysis, data privacy
</div>

</div>

<div class="cv-section">
<h2>Publications & Presentations</h2>

<div class="cv-entry">
<span class="cv-title">[Presentation Title]</span><br>
<span class="cv-meta">CSTE Annual Conference · Grand Rapids, MI · 2025</span>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
[Add publications here in your preferred citation format.]
</div>

</div>
